mapper.select: SELECT TBP.ID, TBP.POST_TITLE, TBP.POST_CONTENT, TBM.MEMBER_NAME, TBP.POST_READ_COUNT FROM TBL_POST TBP JOIN TBL_MEMBER TBM ON TBP.MEMBER_ID = TBM.ID
SELECT TBP.ID, TBP.POST_TITLE, TBP.POST_CONTENT, TBM.MEMBER_NAME, TBP.POST_READ_COUNT FROM TBL_POST TBP JOIN TBL_MEMBER TBM ON TBP.MEMBER_ID = TBM.ID WHERE TBP.ID = #{id}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_POST.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_POST VALUES #{id}, #{postTitle}, #{postContent})
